title: 3.28.0 Hotfix 14
full_text:
3.28.0 Hotfix 14
3.28.0 Hotfix 14
Fixed some cases where UI elements could not be clicked, including the Subterranean Chart, Tujen's Haggle option, and level-up all Gems option.
Fixed a bug where the values on some Unique Item modifers could overflow when you used a Volatile Vaal Orb on them, such as the Burden of Shadows Unique Staff.
Fixed an issue where Vaal Blade Flurry would not channel and ended as soon as you used the skill.
Blighted Maps that drop below Tier 16 are no longer converted to Gold from Voidstones.
This patch has been deployed without restarting the servers. You will need to update your client to receive the client changes in this patch.
